Vol. 1 bookmark

八闽通志

本卷为《八闽志》记载涉及8个府级行政区划，描述山川地理。涉及天文分野。...

menu_book 八闽通志

A digital humanities project dedicated to preserving and analyzing the Ming Dynasty chronicle of Fujian.
